query:
UPDATE games SET
  awayModelSpread = -1.5,
  homeModelSpread = 1.5,
  modelAwaySpreadOdds = '+207',
  modelHomeSpreadOdds = '+207',
  modelTotal = 7.0,
  modelOverOdds = '+133',
  modelUnderOdds = '+109',
  modelAwayML = '+108',
  modelHomeML = '-108',
  modelAwayPLOdds = '+207',
  modelHomePLOdds = '+207'
WHERE id = '2250006';
